reason: The tweet references Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, the leader of ISIS, and uses language indicative of ISIS propaganda, such as 'Khalifa of the Muslims' and a call to action ('infiru khifafan wathiqala'), which is commonly associated with ISIS rhetoric.
original_post: #هام //مؤسسة الفرقان// كلمة لخليفة المسلمين أبي بكر الحسيني القرشي البغدادي بعنوان (انْفِرُوا خِفَافًا وَثِقَالا)
